sys_ui_script.description: Injects a mechanism that will automatically expand all messages displayed in the Now Assist Panel. * Installs ONCE in window.top (shell) * Continuously monitors DOM + OPEN shadow roots * Forces all rich-text blocks expanded * Hides "Show more" / "Show less"
sys_ui_script.name: x_snc_devtools.NowAssistPanelMessageAuto
